I am detail oriented and would like to moderate this site to keep it a clean and fun place to visit everyday.

Back when he was in high school, my dad ran for senior class president on the slogan of

"Slicer is Nicer".

Well, I may certainly be nice too, and that will be tempered with patience, respect and professionalism. As a professional developer for over 15 years and a technology hobbyist since 1982, I believe you'll find I will do well to keep this community moving forward and bringing the best practices of development to aspiring technologists.

I would love an opportunity to assist in continuing to make SO the great place it is. I'm young, but youth is not a measure of character or maturity. I believe that I can contribute to SO as a moderator, by keeping things running smoothly. I also believe that as a moderator, I will have a greater opportunity to learn from those more experienced than me.

Just another avid SO lover and proponent throwing his hat in the ring to hopefully continue to grow and continue to refine the community and the invaluable intellectual resource that is StackOverflow.

One merit I would say proves my dedication and love of this place is my receiving the designation as the Top "Top New User" my joining week.

Thanks!

Real name on the line. Been in IT since 1986 and answering questions since 1997 on various sites including the hyphened one where I have been zone advisor for many years.

In the 10 months I have been here, I have enjoyed gaining enough rep to help edit question and would be happy to give more assistance since that is what I like to do in general, help people.

I am fair, level-headed, tolerant and patient with people who's first language (as in my case) is not English - ditto with people who's first language IS English ;)

I am critical and can receive constructive criticism. It will be interesting to see if the SO community feel I am too tainted with hyphens...

Best regards
Michel Plungjan
